title: Vertical Farming Grows Upward
subtitle: 摩天大楼里的农场能否养活未来城市

paragraphs.en: Vertical farming represents a revolutionary approach to food production that moves agriculture indoors and upward. These high-tech facilities stack crops in multi-story buildings, using LED lighting and precisely controlled environments. Proponents envision vertical farms supplying fresh produce to cities year-round, regardless of climate or season.
paragraphs.zh: 垂直农业代表了一种将农业搬入室内并向上发展的革命性方法。这些高科技设施将农作物堆叠在多层建筑中，使用LED照明和精确控制的环境。支持者设想垂直农场全年向城市供应新鲜农产品，不受气候或季节的影响。

paragraphs.en: The environmental advantages of vertical farming are compelling. These systems use up to ninety-five percent less water than traditional agriculture through recirculating hydroponic systems. Eliminating the need for pesticides protects ecosystems, while local production dramatically reduces transportation emissions and food miles.
paragraphs.zh: 垂直农业的环境优势是令人信服的。通过循环水培系统，这些系统比传统农业节省高达95%的用水量。消除杀虫剂的需求保护了生态系统，而本地生产则大大减少了运输排放和食物里程。

paragraphs.en: Energy consumption remains vertical farming's greatest challenge. The electricity required for artificial lighting and climate control significantly increases production costs. Unless powered by renewable sources, vertical farms may generate substantial carbon emissions despite their other environmental benefits.
paragraphs.zh: 能源消耗仍然是垂直农业最大的挑战。人工照明和气候控制所需的电力大大增加了生产成本。除非由可再生能源供电，否则垂直农场尽管有其他环境效益，但可能会产生大量碳排放。

paragraphs.en: Currently, vertical farms focus primarily on leafy greens and herbs that command premium prices. Growing calorie-dense staple crops like wheat or rice remains economically impractical with current technology. Critics argue that vertical farming cannot significantly contribute to global food security until it can produce staples affordably.
paragraphs.zh: 目前，垂直农场主要专注于能卖高价的叶类蔬菜和香草。用目前的技术种植小麦或大米等高热量主粮在经济上仍然不可行。批评者认为，除非垂直农业能够以低成本生产主粮，否则它无法对全球粮食安全做出重大贡献。

paragraphs.en: Technological advances continue improving vertical farming economics. LED efficiency increases steadily while costs decline. Automation reduces labor expenses, and artificial intelligence optimizes growing conditions. Within decades, vertical farms may become essential components of urban food systems, complementing rather than replacing traditional agriculture.
paragraphs.zh: 技术进步持续改善垂直农业的经济性。LED效率稳步提高而成本下降。自动化减少了劳动力开支，人工智能优化了种植条件。在几十年内，垂直农场可能成为城市食物系统的重要组成部分，补充而非取代传统农业。
